-- 8 of 12 --

Occam’s Razor
▪ 	All things being equal, the simplest solution is preferable
▪ 	(I have one of the simplest businesses in this market - I
also have one of the highest margins in my market)
▪ 	Try to keep things as simple as possible and focus on
having as high a margin as possible
BONUS - The Secrets of Leverage and Scale
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
